item.title: Reinforcement learning for power systems control
item.description:
Adaptive topology control in power systems using multi-agent reinforcement learning and spectral clustering.

Collaborators: Erica van der Sar, Sandjai Bhulai, Jan Viebahn (TenneT)

See below for the list of related publications and preprints.

item.title: Algorithms and optimization for power systems reliability
item.description:
Understanding the fundamental interplay between network topology and failure propagation in power systems using graph theory and spectral methods.

Collaborators: Linqui Guo, Chen Liang, Steven Low, Adam Wierman

See below for the list of related publications and preprints.
